body:
**Preferred term label:**
uterine fundus

**Synonyms**
fundus uteri [exact] reference: PMID:39112955

**Definition (free text, please give PubMed ID)**
The superior, dome-shaped portion of the uterus.
PMID:41204538, PMID:40653088

**Parent term (use https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ols/ontologies/uberon)**
'organ part'
'part of' some uterus

**Your nano-attribution (ORCID)**
https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6677-8489

comments.body:
I'm working on adding this term now. However, I noticed that the PMIDs provided (PMID:41204538 and PMID:40653088) appear to be incorrect - these PMID numbers are beyond the current range. Could you please double-check these references?

In the meantime, I'll proceed with creating the term structure, but I'll need valid PMIDs for the definition before finalizing.

title: [NTR] 'uterine fundus'
